title: Distributed Task Scheduler
description: Fault-tolerant distributed task scheduler implementing the Raft consensus algorithm for leader election and log replication. Handles node failures gracefully with automatic re-election.

title: 2D Game Engine
description: Custom 2D engine in C++ with an OpenGL renderer, AABB/circle physics, a tile-based level editor, and an entity-component system for flexible game object composition.

title: RTOS Sensor Hub
description: Embedded firmware for an STM32F4 running FreeRTOS that aggregates data from multiple I2C and SPI sensors, applies kalman filtering, and transmits over UART with a custom packet protocol.

title: C Subset Compiler
description: Full compiler pipeline for a C-like language: handwritten recursive-descent parser, semantic analysis, SSA-form IR, and x86-64 code generation with register allocation.

title: Procedural Roguelike RPG
description: Unity roguelike with BSP-tree dungeon generation, hand-drawn pixel art, turn-based combat, and a data-driven item system. Published on itch.io.

title: Network Anomaly Detector
description: Real-time anomaly detection for network traffic using a variational autoencoder trained on the KDD Cup dataset. Achieves 97% precision with sub-10ms inference latency.

title: BLDC Motor Controller
description: Bare-metal firmware for sinusoidal field-oriented control of a brushless DC motor on an STM32G4, driven by a custom gate driver PCB. Includes USB-CDC tuning interface.
